tagline: Backyards were made for back floats

trust_badges.badge_1: Dan's Best of the Best Award

hero.headline:
Long Island's Trusted Pool Builders
Since 1987
hero.subheadline: Your backyard should be a retreat, not a project. For 38 years, Islandia Pools has designed, built, and maintained pools for families across the North Fork and Hamptons. From the first sketch to the final dive, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom design and construction to weekly maintenance and supplies, Islandia Pools is your single source for every aspect of pool and spa ownership on Long Island's East End.

cards.title: Custom Pool Design & Build
cards.description: Award-winning inground vinyl and gunite pool design tailored to your property, lifestyle, and budget. From concept drawings to the finished product, our team builds pools that become the centerpiece of your backyard.

cards.title: Spa Sales & Installation
cards.description: Premium Bullfrog and Dream Maker spas selected, delivered, and installed by our team. Turn your backyard into a year-round retreat with a spa that complements your pool perfectly.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance & Repairs
cards.description: Seasonal openings, closings, weekly cleaning, and expert equipment repairs. We keep your pool in peak condition so you never have to worry about water quality or equipment failures.

cards.title: Backyard Renovation
cards.description: Complete outdoor transformations including pool resurfacing, new decking, lighting upgrades, and landscape integration that breathe new life into aging backyards.

cards.title: Eco-Friendly Pool Systems
cards.description: Specialists in EcoSmarte chemical-free purification, Mineral Springs salt systems, and energy-efficient equipment that reduce costs and are gentler on your family and the environment.

cards.title: Retail Store & Supplies
cards.description: Visit our fully stocked Riverhead showroom for pool chemicals, equipment, accessories, and expert advice. Everything you need to maintain your pool between service visits.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. We will visit your property, assess the space, and provide an honest, transparent quote. No pressure, no hidden fees, just straightforward advice from a family team that has been doing this for 38 years.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles every phase of the project from permits and excavation to plumbing, electrical, and finishing. Dave Freeborn personally oversees every build to ensure quality meets the Islandia standard.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your new pool is ready. And when you need maintenance, repairs, or supplies, we are right here in Riverhead. We stay with you for the life of your pool because that is what a real pool company does.

about.label: Why East End Families Choose Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust and Craftsmanship
about.description: Islandia Pools was founded in 1987 when the Freeborn family could not find a pool company they trusted for their own backyard. Dave Freeborn turned that frustration into a mission: build a company that treats every customer's pool like it is their own. Today, Dave works alongside his wife and a dedicated team, serving hundreds of homeowners and architects across the North Fork and Hamptons with the same quality, integrity, and care that started it all 38 years ago.

features.title: 38 Years of East End Expertise
features.description: We know Long Island soil, weather, and building codes inside and out. That local knowledge translates to pools that last decades, not just seasons.

features.title: Design, Build, Maintain, Supply
features.description: No need to juggle multiple contractors. We handle every stage of pool ownership from the first sketch to ongoing care and a fully stocked retail store.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Innovation
features.description: We lead the region in chemical-free and low-chemical pool systems including EcoSmarte and Mineral Springs, so your family swims in cleaner, healthier water.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, written quote before we start. Choose the service level that fits your needs and budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit or project milestone, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 38 years by standing behind every pool we design, build, and maintain. Your trust is the foundation of our family business, and we will never take it for granted.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 6 to 10 weeks from excavation to completion, depending on the design complexity and permitting timeline. We provide a detailed schedule before we break ground so you know exactly what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you did not build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain and repair all types of pools regardless of who built them. Our technicians are experienced with vinyl, gunite, fiberglass, and above-ground pools from any manufacturer.

faqs.question: What makes your eco-friendly pool systems different?
faqs.answer: Our EcoSmarte and Mineral Springs systems dramatically reduce or eliminate the need for traditional chlorine. You get cleaner, softer water that is gentler on skin, eyes, and swimsuits while also reducing ongoing chemical costs.

faqs.question: Can I visit your retail store for supplies?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our Riverhead showroom at 108 Fishel Ave is fully stocked with chemicals, equipment, accessories, and test kits. Our staff can also test your water on the spot and recommend exactly what you need.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool openings and closings?
faqs.answer: We do. Our seasonal opening and closing services protect your investment through Long Island winters and ensure a smooth, worry-free start every spring. Most clients schedule both services in advance for peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Paul C.
testimonials.text: From start to finish, things went smooth and right on schedule. The team was professional and delivered exactly what we envisioned. Our backyard is now the gathering place for the whole neighborhood.

testimonials.name: Dr. Michelle I.
testimonials.text: Professional, knowledgeable, and attentive service throughout the entire design process. They helped us create the perfect backyard oasis with clear and transparent pricing at every step.

testimonials.name: Jay B.
testimonials.text: Five stars. They exceeded my highest hopes. The final result was beyond what I imagined for our backyard. Islandia Pools is the real deal and I recommend them to everyone on the East End.

contact.headline:
Ready for the Backyard
You Have Always Wanted?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation from a family team with 38 years of East End experience. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest quote.
